title: sclarea indica
intro: Sclarea indica, also known as clary sage, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. Clary sage oil, extracted from the plant's flowers, has been found to have numerous health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and relieving menstrual cramps. The herbal preparations of sclarea indica include essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
